mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( LOWER(tenant_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(tenant_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') )
SELECT FROM tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (tenant_code, tenant_name, status) VALUES (#{tenantCode}, #{tenantName}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET tenant_code = #{request.tenantCode}, tenant_name = #{request.tenantName}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE tenant SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
